plugins.name: google-ads-baby
plugins.description: Google Ads campaign management with two-phase safety confirmations: build complete Search/Display/Performance Max campaigns, manage keywords, ads, budgets, targeting, ad schedules, conversion goals and assets, plus read-only account analysis (hygiene report, budget scaling, search-terms waste, PMax breakdown). Every mutation requires explicit user approval.

plugins.name: meta-ads-baby
plugins.description: Meta (Facebook) Ads campaign management with two-phase safety confirmations.

plugins.name: google-analytics-baby
plugins.description: Google Analytics 4 read-only marketing analytics for ads: campaign performance, tracking diagnostics, and GA4-based Google Ads cost/ROAS.

plugins.name: report-baby
plugins.description: Local report renderer for polished PDF/PNG deliverables from HTML, URLs, or built-in report templates.

plugins.name: marketing-context-mcp
plugins.description: Durable local marketing memory: client context, decisions, reviews, and operational tasks, layered on top of a bundled marketing knowledge library that stays current with the plugin. Configurable via update_config; self-diagnosing via get_context_health.
